title: Volumes — gcePersistentDisk (deprecated)
text:
In Kubernetes 1.36, all operations for the in-tree
gcePersistentDisk
type
are redirected to the
pd.csi.storage.gke.io
CSI
driver.
The
gcePersistentDisk
in-tree storage driver was deprecated in the Kubernetes v1.17 release
and then removed entirely in the v1.28 release.
The Kubernetes project suggests that you use the
Google Compute Engine Persistent Disk CSI
third party storage driver instead.
